data.body:
womenfromhistory
~ Goddesses of Health, Sekhmet ~
Sekhmet was one of the most powerful goddesses in ancient Egyptian mythology, associated with war, destruction, disease & healing. She was considered a daughter of the sun god Ra & was often described as his “eye” representing his power & vengeance.
